Task description mentions 'rotate it to exactly 45 degrees' and verifier.py lines 119-123
Task description mentions 'rotate it to exactly 180 degrees' and verifier.py lines 119-123

privileged_info_summary: The task involves rotating three named shapes in a LibreOffice Impress presentation (design_review.odp) to precise angles: Controller (blue rectangle) to 90°, DataFlow (green arrow) to 45°, and IOPort (red diamond) to 180°. Each rotation has a tolerance of ±7°. The presentation is synthetically generated by the task setup script using Python and odfpy. All rotation angles and tolerances are consistently specified across the task description, metadata, and verifier implementation.
